def predict_next_frame(frame, action, xy=None):
    # deep copy
    new = [row[:] for row in frame]
    h, w = 64, 64

    if action == "ACTION6":
        x, y = xy
        new[y][x] = 3
        return new

    # helper to swap two 2x2 blocks
    def swap_blocks(r, c, block1, block2):
        for dr, dc in block1:
            new[r+dr][c+dc] = block2[0][2]
        for dr, dc in block2:
            new[r+dr][c+dc] = block1[0][2]

    # patterns for ACTION1, ACTION2, ACTION3, ACTION4
    if action in ("ACTION1", "ACTION4"):
        # vertical pair: 2x2 of color A above 2x2 of color B
        for r in range(h - 3):
            for c in range(w - 1):
                if (frame[r][c] == 2 and frame[r][c+1] == 2 and
                    frame[r+1][c] == 2 and frame[r+1][c+1] == 2 and
                    frame[r+2][c] == 14 and frame[r+2][c+1] == 14 and
                    frame[r+3][c] == 14 and frame[r+3][c+1] == 14):
                    # swap
                    swap_blocks(r, c,
                                [(0,0),(0,1),(1,0),(1,1)],
                                [(2,0),(2,1),(3,0),(3,1)])
                    # set bottom row cell
                    new[63][c] = 3
                    return new
    else:  # ACTION2, ACTION3
        # horizontal pair: 2x2 of color A left of 2x2 of color B
        for r in range(h - 1):
            for c in range(w - 3):
                if (frame[r][c] == 2 and frame[r+1][c] == 2 and
                    frame[r][c+1] == 2 and frame[r+1][c+1] == 2 and
                    frame[r][c+2] == 14 and frame[r+1][c+2] == 14 and
                    frame[r][c+3] == 14 and frame[r+1][c+3] == 14):
                    # swap
                    swap_blocks(r, c,
                                [(0,0),(1,0),(0,1),(1,1)],
                                [(0,2),(1,2),(0,3),(1,3)])
                    return new
    return new

        for dr, dc in block2:
            new[r+dr][c+dc] = block1[0][2]

    # ACTION1: 2x2 of 2 above 2x2 of 14
    if action == "ACTION1":
        for r in range(h - 3):

                                [(0,0),(0,1),(1,0),(1,1)],
                                [(2,0),(2,1),(3,0),(3,1)])
                    new[63][c] = 3
                    return new

    # ACTION4: 2x2 of 14 above 2x2 of 2
    if action == "ACTION4":
        for r in range(h - 3):
            for c in range(w - 1):
                if (frame[r][c] == 14 and frame[r][c+1] == 14 and
                    frame[r+1][c] == 14 and frame[r+1][c+1] == 14 and
                    frame[r+2][c] == 2 and frame[r+2][c+1] == 2 and
                    frame[r+3][c] == 2 and frame[r+3][c+1] == 2):
                    swap_blocks(r, c,
                                [(0,0),(0,1),(1,0),(1,1)],
                                [(2,0),(2,1),(3,0),(3,1)])
                    new[63][c] = 3
                    return new

    # ACTION2 and ACTION3: horizontal patterns
    if action in ("ACTION2", "ACTION3"):

                    swap_blocks(r, c,
                                [(0,0),(1,0),(0,1),(1,1)],
                                [(0,2),(1,2),(0,3),(1,3)])
                    return new

    return new

def predict_next_frame(frame, action, xy=None):
    # deep copy
    new = [row[:] for row in frame]
    h, w = 64, 64

    if action == "ACTION6":
        x, y = xy
        new[y][x] = 3
        return new

    # helper to swap two 2x2 blocks
    def swap_blocks(r, c, block1, block2):
        for dr, dc in block1:
            new[r+dr][c+dc] = block2[0][2]
        for dr, dc in block2:
            new[r+dr][c+dc] = block1[0][2]

    # ACTION1: 2x2 of 2 above 2x2 of 14
    if action == "ACTION1":
        for r in range(h - 3):
            for c in range(w - 1):
                if (frame[r][c] == 2 and frame[r][c+1] == 2 and
                    frame[r+1][c] == 2 and frame[r+1][c+1] == 2 and
                    frame[r+2][c] == 14 and frame[r+2][c+1] == 14 and
                    frame[r+3][c] == 14 and frame[r+3][c+1] == 14):
                    swap_blocks(r, c,
                                [(0,0),(0,1),(1,0),(1,1)],
                                [(2,0),(2,1),(3,0),(3,1)])
                    new[63][c] = 3
                    return new

    # ACTION4: 2x2 of 14 above 2x2 of 2
    if action == "ACTION4":
        for r in range(h - 3):
            for c in range(w - 1):
                if (frame[r][c] == 14 and frame[r][c+1] == 14 and
                    frame[r+1][c] == 14 and frame[r+1][c+1] == 14 and
                    frame[r+2][c] == 2 and frame[r+2][c+1] == 2 and
                    frame[r+3][c] == 2 and frame[r+3][c+1] == 2):
                    swap_blocks(r, c,
                                [(0,0),(0,1),(1,0),(1,1)],
                                [(2,0),(2,1),(3,0),(3,1)])
                    new[63][c] = 3
                    return new

    # ACTION2 and ACTION3: horizontal patterns
    if action in ("ACTION2", "ACTION3"):
        for r in range(h - 1):
            for c in range(w - 3):
                if (frame[r][c] == 2 and frame[r+1][c] == 2 and
                    frame[r][c+1] == 2 and frame[r+1][c+1] == 2 and
                    frame[r][c+2] == 14 and frame[r+1][c+2] == 14 and
                    frame[r][c+3] == 14 and frame[r+1][c+3] == 14):
                    swap_blocks(r, c,
                                [(0,0),(1,0),(0,1),(1,1)],
                                [(0,2),(1,2),(0,3),(1,3)])
                    return new

    return new
